message:
refactor(harness): migrate test infrastructure and suites to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> values

bloodstream: update DifferentialAutomaton filter values and WeightedRow
constructors to use .into() for Arc<str> SqliteValue::Text.

sql_pipeline_suites: update expected values in pipeline test definitions.

All 13 harness test files updated to use .into() constructors for
SqliteValue::Text and SqliteValue::Blob, matching the Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]>
type migration from the types crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
